---
title: "Apologia pro Vita Sua: Being a reply to a pamphlet entitled \'What, then, does Dr. Newman mean?\'"
---

## Apologia pro Vita Sua: Being a reply to a pamphlet entitled \'What, then, does Dr. Newman mean?\'

**Author:** The Rev. John Henry Newman
**Date:** 1864
**Imprint:** London: Longman

### Notes

Published originally in parts.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
